ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Pee.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.None.Poop.message: {target} doesn't feel the urge to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to pee.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Warning.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:yellow}starting to feel the urge{/fgcolor} to poop.

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Pee.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in {tpronoun:p} bladder is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} is {fgcolor:orange}feeling very uncomfortable{/fgcolor} - the pressure in {tpronoun:p} bowels is building up!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor} If {tpronoun:s} doesn't find a toilet soon, {tpronoun:s} will wet {tpronoun:r}!

ChatMessages.Urge.IC.Bursting.Poop.message: {target} {fgcolor:red}can't hold it much longer!{/fgcolor} If {tpronoun:s} doesn't find a toilet soon, {tpronoun:s} will soil {tpronoun:r}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Pee.message: {target} truly doesn't need to pee right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.None.Poop.message: {target} truly doesn't need to poop right now.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Warning.Pee.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to pee, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:yellow}is starting to need to go{/fgcolor}.

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Danger.Poop.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to poop, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:orange}urgently needs to go{/fgcolor}!

ChatMessages.Urge.OOC.Bursting.Pee.message: {target} thinks {tpronoun:s} doesn't need to pee, but in fact {tpronoun:s} {fgcolor:red}is on the verge of wetting {tpronoun:r}{/fgcolor}!
